rationale: Educ. Code §30.059 governs leasing of Texas School for the Deaf property for a day-care center. It has no relation to residence homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The Texas School for the Deaf may lease available building space on the school's campus located at 1102 South Congress, Austin, Travis County, to a private provider to provide a day-care center for children of the school's employees, other state employees, and private customers.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this statute.
